commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `localModelLean` derive default structured Tool Search config when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, threads that runtime config into embedded runner tool setup, and updates local-model docs and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +85, Docs +2. Total +122 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Reproduction is not applicable as a bug path; source comparison shows current main lacks the proposed lean-mode Tool Search default and the PR adds it.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR plus compatibility-sensitive experimental default behavior needs maintainer acceptance; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- Defaults `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when `tools.toolSearch` is not explicitly configured.
- Preserves explicit operator Tool Search config, including the `tools.toolSearch: false` opt-out.
- Threads the lean effective config into embedded runner Tool Search setup and documents the behavior for local model/Ollama users.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: local-model lean runs now compact larger tool catalogs behind structured Tool Search controls by default, reducing prompt/tool schema pressure for smaller models while preserving explicit operator config.

Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate against the rebased maintainer branch, focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree, docs/formatter/diff checks, branch autoreview, and earlier Ollama Cloud source-level stream probes with hosted small models.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `31d68ce6815`; focused local wrapper passed `src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts` and `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` with 65/65 tests after the final rebase; oxfmt, docs formatting, docs MDX, and diff checks passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.84)`; AWS Crabbox `check:changed` passed with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_b88f4435bf3e`, slug `quick-crayfish`, run `run_1a8a469d2140`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0, and lease cleanup stopped. The changed gate selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`.

Earlier live Ollama Cloud source-level stream proof on this PR passed with structured Tool Search control tools for `gemma3:12b`, `rnj-1:8b`, and `gpt-oss:20b`; each payload contained `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, `tool_call`, `think: false`, `num_ctx: 4096`, and returned `OK`.

Observed result after fix: lean mode injects `{ enabled: true, mode: "tools", searchDefaultLimit: 5, maxSearchLimit: 10 }` only when Tool Search is unset; explicit `tools.toolSearch` config remains untouched; the embedded runner uses the derived runtime config consistently for control exposure and catalog compaction.

What was not tested: no full end-to-end chat/channel agent turn with a live local Ollama daemon in this PR; this PR proves embedded runner config behavior, hosted Ollama structured-control compatibility from earlier live probes, and current changed-gate coverage.
target.author: vincentkoc
